description: Heater cycling on and off every 5 minutes. Room temperature dropping to 14C by period 3.
Three fluorescent tubes flickering in the southeast corner. Safety concern for basketball.
notes: Tubes replaced from stock. No additional purchase needed.

description: Sink faucet leaking continuously. Water pooling on counter.
South entrance door closer arm broken. Door will not close fully in cold weather.
notes: Door closer mechanism replaced. Fire code compliance restored.

description: Coffee maker (Bunn commercial) stopped heating. Staff morale emergency.
notes: Unplugged and replugged. Working again. Jim is a hero.

description: Pothole near the staff parking row expanding. Risk of vehicle damage.
notes: Temporary cone placed. Full repair deferred to winter break restriping project.

description: Two ceiling-mounted projectors (Epson) showing yellow tint. Lamp hours at 4800.
notes: Replacement lamps ordered. ETA Dec 19. Will install over break.

description: Clay trap in the art room sink clogged. Sink backing up during ceramics class.
notes: Trap cleaned and flushed. Art department reminded about clay disposal procedure.

description: Handrail loose on the second-floor landing. Wobbly when weight applied.
notes: Re-anchored with new bolts. Passed safety check.

description: Network drop in Guidance Room B not working. Counsellor unable to access student records.
notes: IT dispatched. Suspected bad patch cable at the wall plate.

description: Roof leak above the northeast bleachers during heavy rain. Drip onto seating area.
notes: Temporary bucket placed. Roof inspection scheduled for Dec 20.

description: Portable 1 heater not reaching set temperature. Students wearing coats in class.
notes: Board HVAC team notified. Portable units are 12 years old and nearing replacement.

description: Ice patch forming at the entrance to the staff lot. Salt application needed.

work_order_id: Note: These are facilities maintenance records only. Costs are charged to the board facilities budget not the school operating budget.
The school operating budget for building maintenance is in board_brief_budget.csv under Building maintenance allocation.
These work orders are NOT part of the board brief reconciliation.
